ann_welcome_professional_seed.content: Beacon now includes connected learning paths, skills, resources, quizzes, practice tasks, and portfolio projects to help students prepare for academic and career goals.
ann_welcome_professional_seed.title: Welcome to Beacon Professional Learning Paths

cat_career_business.description: Product management, business operations, strategy, and project leadership careers.
cat_career_business.title: Business & Product

cat_career_cloud.description: Cloud engineering, DevOps, infrastructure design, and deployment careers.
cat_career_cloud.title: Cloud & Infrastructure

cat_career_data.description: Data science, analytics, machine learning, and artificial intelligence careers.
cat_career_data.title: Data & AI

cat_career_design.description: UI/UX design, product design, user research, and digital product experience careers.

cat_career_education.description: Teaching, instructional design, academic support, and training careers.
cat_career_education.title: Education & Training

cat_career_finance.description: Financial analysis, accounting, budgeting, and business reporting careers.
cat_career_finance.title: Finance & Accounting

cat_career_healthcare.description: Healthcare, medical administration, public health, and health technology careers.
cat_career_healthcare.title: Healthcare & Medicine

cat_career_marketing.description: Digital marketing, SEO, content strategy, brand growth, and campaign management careers.
cat_career_marketing.title: Marketing & Growth

cat_career_security.description: Cybersecurity, risk management, secure systems, and compliance-focused careers.
cat_career_security.title: Security & Compliance

cat_career_tech.description: Software engineering, web development, backend systems, and application development careers.
cat_career_tech.title: Technology & Software

path_ai_engineer.description: Build, test, and deploy artificial intelligence and machine learning models.
path_ai_engineer.longDescription: AI engineers build AI models using machine learning algorithms and deep learning neural networks to draw business insights. They sit at the intersection of software engineering and data science.
path_ai_engineer.requiredEducation: Master's degree in Computer Science or AI
path_ai_engineer.title: AI Engineer

path_backend_dev.description: Architect the server-side logic, databases, and APIs of applications.
path_backend_dev.longDescription: Backend developers focus on databases, backend logic, APIs, architecture, and servers. They ensure that websites perform correctly, focusing on behind-the-scenes activities that happen when performing any action on a website.
path_backend_dev.title: Backend Developer

path_cloud_architect.description: Design, deploy, and manage scalable and secure cloud infrastructure.
path_cloud_architect.longDescription: Cloud Architects oversee a company's cloud computing strategy, including cloud adoption plans, cloud application design, and cloud management and monitoring. They possess deep knowledge of AWS, Azure, or GCP.
path_cloud_architect.title: Cloud Architect

path_cybersec_analyst.description: Protect organizational data and infrastructure from cyber threats.
path_cybersec_analyst.longDescription: Cybersecurity analysts protect company hardware, software, and networks from cybercriminals. Their primary role is to understand company IT infrastructure in detail, monitor it at all times, and evaluate threats that could potentially breach the network.
path_cybersec_analyst.title: Cybersecurity Analyst

path_data_scientist.description: Analyze complex data to extract actionable insights and build predictive models.
path_data_scientist.longDescription: Data scientists utilize their analytical, statistical, and programming skills to collect, analyze, and interpret large data sets. They then use this information to develop data-driven solutions to difficult business challenges.
path_data_scientist.title: Data Scientist

path_digital_marketer.description: Drive brand awareness and lead generation through digital channels.
path_digital_marketer.longDescription: Digital marketers are responsible for using digital channels to generate leads and build brand awareness. They manage SEO, content marketing, social media strategies, and digital advertising campaigns.
path_digital_marketer.requiredEducation: Bachelor's degree in Marketing or Communications
path_digital_marketer.title: Digital Marketing Specialist

path_frontend_dev.description: Build user-facing interfaces and interactive web experiences.
path_frontend_dev.longDescription: Frontend developers are responsible for implementing visual elements that users see and interact with in a web application. They combine design, technology, and programming to code a website's appearance.
path_frontend_dev.requiredEducation: Bachelor's degree or equivalent bootcamp experience
path_frontend_dev.title: Frontend Developer

path_fullstack_dev.description: Master both frontend and backend development to build end-to-end solutions.
path_fullstack_dev.longDescription: Full stack developers are versatile engineers capable of tackling both client and server software. They understand how everything works from top to bottom, making them invaluable for startups and complex enterprise projects.
path_fullstack_dev.title: Full Stack Developer

path_product_manager.description: Lead cross-functional teams to deliver products that meet customer needs.
path_product_manager.longDescription: Product Managers identify the customer need and the larger business objectives that a product or feature will fulfill, articulate what success looks like for a product, and rally a team to turn that vision into a reality.
path_product_manager.title: Product Manager

path_ui_ux_designer.description: Design intuitive, engaging, and highly functional digital product experiences.
path_ui_ux_designer.longDescription: UI/UX designers are responsible for the overall feel of the product (UX) and how the product is laid out (UI). They work closely with product managers and engineers to realize a seamless product experience.
path_ui_ux_designer.requiredEducation: Bachelor's degree or strong design portfolio
path_ui_ux_designer.title: UI/UX Designer

lp_ai_ml_foundations.description: Build a foundation in Python, machine learning, deep learning concepts, and AI-assisted study workflows.
lp_ai_ml_foundations.title: AI & Machine Learning Foundations

lp_backend_api_development.description: Learn backend fundamentals through Python, SQL, API design, security basics, and a REST API project.
lp_backend_api_development.title: Backend API Development

lp_cloud_architecture.description: Understand cloud services, containers, CI/CD, deployment planning, and scalable architecture basics.
lp_cloud_architecture.title: Cloud Architecture Foundations

lp_cybersecurity_foundations.description: Learn defensive cybersecurity fundamentals, web security checks, network security basics, and audit reporting.
lp_cybersecurity_foundations.title: Cybersecurity Foundations

lp_data_science_intro.description: Learn Python, Pandas, SQL, visualization, and basic machine learning through practical tasks and projects.
lp_data_science_intro.title: Data Science Foundations

lp_digital_marketing_foundations.description: Learn SEO, content planning, communication, page auditing, and campaign planning basics.
lp_digital_marketing_foundations.title: Digital Marketing Foundations

lp_frontend_basics.description: A structured path for learning JavaScript, React, Next.js, Git, and a portfolio-ready frontend project.
lp_frontend_basics.title: Frontend Development Foundations

lp_fullstack_portfolio_path.description: Build end-to-end skills using frontend, backend, SQL, Git, security, and a full stack project.
lp_fullstack_portfolio_path.title: Full Stack Portfolio Path

lp_product_management_foundations.description: Learn product strategy, Agile planning, requirements writing, communication, and PRD creation.
lp_product_management_foundations.title: Product Management Foundations

lp_uiux_product_design.description: Learn user research, wireframing, Figma basics, communication, and design case study creation.
lp_uiux_product_design.title: UI/UX Product Design Foundations

task_agile_sprint_breakdown.description: Break a software feature into sprint-ready tasks.
task_agile_sprint_breakdown.instructions: Choose a simple feature, write user stories, acceptance criteria, sprint tasks, and a basic definition of done.
task_agile_sprint_breakdown.title: Agile Sprint Breakdown

task_aws_architecture_notes.description: Summarize the main AWS services used in a basic web app deployment.
task_aws_architecture_notes.instructions: Write short notes explaining compute, storage, database, CDN, monitoring, and IAM. Include one example service for each category.
task_aws_architecture_notes.title: AWS Architecture Notes

task_ci_cd_pipeline_plan.description: Design a basic CI/CD workflow for a web application.
task_ci_cd_pipeline_plan.instructions: Write a CI/CD plan that includes install, lint, typecheck, test, build, and deploy stages. Explain what should happen if any stage fails.
task_ci_cd_pipeline_plan.title: CI/CD Pipeline Plan

task_communication_status_update.description: Practice writing a clear project status update.
task_communication_status_update.instructions: Write a short update containing completed work, current blockers, next steps, and a clear request for support if needed.
task_communication_status_update.title: Professional Status Update

task_data_visualization_chart.description: Create clear charts and write insights from a dataset.
task_data_visualization_chart.instructions: Choose a dataset, create one bar chart and one line chart, label axes clearly, and write three useful insights from the visualization.
task_data_visualization_chart.title: Data Visualization Chart Practice

task_deep_learning_concepts.description: Create a concept map explaining core deep learning terms.
task_deep_learning_concepts.instructions: Create a diagram or written map explaining neurons, layers, activation functions, loss, epochs, overfitting, and validation data.
task_deep_learning_concepts.title: Deep Learning Concept Map

task_docker_basic_container.instructions: Create a Dockerfile for a small Node or Python app. Build the image, run the container, expose a port, and document the commands in a README.
task_docker_basic_container.title: Docker Container Practice

task_figma_wireframe.description: Design a simple dashboard wireframe in Figma.
task_figma_wireframe.instructions: Create low-fidelity wireframes for login, dashboard, resources, and skill details pages. Use consistent spacing and clear labels.
task_figma_wireframe.title: Figma Low-Fidelity Wireframe

task_financial_analysis_budget_review.description: Practice reviewing a simple project budget and identifying financial risks.
task_financial_analysis_budget_review.instructions: Create a simple project budget with expected costs, actual costs, variance, and notes. Calculate total budget, total actual cost, variance percentage, and write three recommendations for improving cost control.
task_financial_analysis_budget_review.title: Budget Review and Financial Analysis Practice

task_git_branch_workflow.description: Practice a professional Git workflow with branches and meaningful commits.
task_git_branch_workflow.instructions: Create a new branch, make three meaningful commits, merge into main, and write a short changelog explaining what changed and why.
task_git_branch_workflow.title: Git Branch Workflow Practice

task_js_array_methods.description: Practice map, filter, reduce, find, and some using real student/course data examples.
task_js_array_methods.instructions: Create an array of student objects with name, grade, major, and status. Use map to extract names, filter to find passed students, reduce to calculate the average grade, find to locate a specific student, and some to check if any student is at risk.
task_js_array_methods.title: JavaScript Array Methods Practice

task_js_async_fetch.description: Practice calling an API, handling loading state, and managing errors clearly.
task_js_async_fetch.instructions: Build a small JavaScript module that fetches posts from a public API, displays titles, handles loading state, catches network errors, and shows a clean error message.
task_js_async_fetch.title: Fetch API and Async/Await Practice

task_leadership_team_reflection.description: Practice reflecting on team leadership, decision-making, and communication.
task_leadership_team_reflection.instructions: Write a short reflection about a team situation. Include the goal, team roles, challenge, decision made, communication approach, result, and what could be improved next time.
task_leadership_team_reflection.title: Leadership Team Reflection

task_ml_train_test_split.description: Practice preparing data for a basic machine learning model.
task_ml_train_test_split.instructions: Load a small dataset, split it into training and testing sets, train a simple model, evaluate performance, and explain limitations.
task_ml_train_test_split.title: Machine Learning Train/Test Split Practice

task_network_security_basics.description: Explain basic network security controls in a short report.
task_network_security_basics.instructions: Write a one-page report explaining firewall, IDS/IPS, VPN, MFA, least privilege, and logging with one practical example for each.
task_network_security_basics.title: Network Security Basics Report

task_nextjs_route_structure.description: Practice building a clean route structure in Next.js.
task_nextjs_route_structure.instructions: Create routes for dashboard, resources, skills, career paths, and profile. Add a shared layout and navigation. Keep route names clear and consistent.
task_nextjs_route_structure.title: Next.js Route Structure Practice

task_pandas_dataframe_cleaning.description: Use Pandas to clean missing values and prepare data for analysis.
task_pandas_dataframe_cleaning.instructions: Load a dataset, inspect missing values, fill or remove invalid records, rename columns, create summary statistics, and export the cleaned result.
task_pandas_dataframe_cleaning.title: Pandas Data Cleaning Practice

task_product_management_plan.description: Create a simple product plan for a student software feature.
task_product_management_plan.instructions: Define the problem, target users, user stories, success metrics, risks, and a four-week delivery timeline.
task_product_management_plan.title: Product Management Mini Plan

task_prompt_engineering_compare.description: Compare weak and strong prompts for technical learning.
task_prompt_engineering_compare.instructions: Write three weak prompts and improve each one by adding role, context, constraints, examples, and expected output format.
task_prompt_engineering_compare.title: Prompt Engineering Comparison Practice

task_python_file_processing.description: Read, clean, and summarize CSV data using Python.
task_python_file_processing.instructions: Load a CSV file, remove empty rows, validate numeric fields, calculate summary statistics, and export a cleaned CSV file.
task_python_file_processing.title: Python CSV Processing Practice

task_react_component_props.description: Build reusable React components using props and clean component structure.
task_react_component_props.instructions: Create a CourseCard component that receives title, description, level, duration, and progress props. Render at least five cards from an array and keep the component reusable.
task_react_component_props.title: React Components and Props Practice

task_react_state_filtering.description: Practice useState by building an interactive list filter.
task_react_state_filtering.instructions: Build a skills list with a search input and category filter. The UI should update immediately when the user types or changes category. Add an empty state when no skills match.
task_react_state_filtering.title: React State and Filtering Practice

task_seo_page_audit.description: Review a webpage for basic SEO improvements.
task_seo_page_audit.instructions: Audit title, meta description, headings, internal links, image alt text, and page content. Write five improvement recommendations.
task_seo_page_audit.title: SEO Page Audit Practice

task_sql_joins_grouping.description: Practice extracting insights from relational tables.
task_sql_joins_grouping.instructions: Given students, courses, and enrollments tables, write queries for enrolled students per course, average grade per course, top-performing students, and students with no enrollments.
task_sql_joins_grouping.title: SQL JOIN and GROUP BY Practice

task_ts_interface_modeling.description: Model clean TypeScript interfaces for a student learning platform.
task_ts_interface_modeling.instructions: Create TypeScript interfaces for Student, Course, Skill, Resource, and Task. Add union types for task status and priority. Write sample objects and make sure TypeScript catches invalid values.
task_ts_interface_modeling.title: TypeScript Interface Modeling

task_user_research_questions.description: Prepare interview questions for understanding student learning needs.
task_user_research_questions.instructions: Write 10 open-ended interview questions. Group them into goals, pain points, current tools, and improvement ideas.
task_user_research_questions.title: User Research Interview Questions

task_web_security_checklist.description: Review a web app against common defensive security checks.
task_web_security_checklist.instructions: Create a defensive checklist covering authentication, authorization, input validation, secrets handling, HTTPS, error messages, and dependency updates.
task_web_security_checklist.title: Web Security Checklist Practice

proj_ai_prompted_study_assistant.description: Design a small assistant concept that generates study plans and resource suggestions from structured student inputs.
requirements: Document how recommendations should be stored
proj_ai_prompted_study_assistant.title: AI-Prompted Study Assistant

proj_budget_analysis_report.description: Create a simple budget analysis report for a software project or student club initiative.
requirements: Create a simple cost summary table
Identify at least three financial risks
Write recommendations for better budget control
proj_budget_analysis_report.title: Budget Analysis Report

proj_ci_cd_release_pipeline.description: Design and document a CI/CD pipeline for a frontend or full stack project.
requirements: Add lint, typecheck, test, and build steps
proj_ci_cd_release_pipeline.title: CI/CD Release Pipeline

proj_cloud_deployment_blueprint.description: Design a deployment plan for a scalable web application on a cloud provider.
requirements: Define compute, storage, and database services
proj_cloud_deployment_blueprint.title: Cloud Deployment Blueprint

proj_cybersecurity_audit_report.description: Review a sample web application and write a structured defensive security audit report.
requirements: Identify exposed secrets or unsafe configuration
proj_cybersecurity_audit_report.title: Cybersecurity Audit Report

proj_data_cleaning_pipeline.description: Build a Python and Pandas pipeline that cleans, validates, and summarizes raw CSV data.
proj_data_cleaning_pipeline.title: Data Cleaning Pipeline

proj_digital_marketing_content_plan.description: Create a practical content and SEO plan for a small educational platform.
proj_digital_marketing_content_plan.title: Digital Marketing Content Plan

proj_dockerized_web_app.description: Containerize a simple web application and document the development workflow.
proj_dockerized_web_app.title: Dockerized Web Application

proj_fullstack_task_manager.description: Build a task management app with authentication, task CRUD, filters, and user-specific data.
requirements: Write a clear README and deployment guide
proj_fullstack_task_manager.title: Full Stack Task Manager

proj_ml_prediction_model.description: Train and evaluate a basic machine learning model on a structured dataset.
proj_ml_prediction_model.title: Machine Learning Prediction Model

proj_nextjs_portfolio.description: Create a personal portfolio that showcases skills, projects, contact links, and a clean responsive layout.
requirements: Create sections for about, skills, projects, and contact
proj_nextjs_portfolio.title: Next.js Developer Portfolio

proj_product_requirements_doc.description: Write a professional PRD for a student-focused software feature.
requirements: Add success metrics and launch risks
proj_product_requirements_doc.title: Product Requirements Document

proj_react_weather_dashboard.description: Build a responsive weather dashboard that searches cities and displays current weather and a multi-day forecast.
requirements: Handle loading, empty, and error states
Deploy the project and document setup steps
proj_react_weather_dashboard.title: React Weather Dashboard

proj_rest_api_service.description: Create a backend API for managing students, courses, and enrollments.
proj_rest_api_service.title: REST API Service

proj_sql_student_records.description: Design a relational schema and write queries for a student records system.
requirements: Create tables for students, courses, and enrollments
proj_sql_student_records.title: SQL Student Records System

proj_team_leadership_retrospective.description: Prepare a professional retrospective report for a small software team or class project.
requirements: Define the project goal and team roles
Explain the main challenge faced by the team
Describe the leadership and communication approach used
Identify what worked well and what did not
Write three action items for the next project
proj_team_leadership_retrospective.title: Team Leadership Retrospective

proj_uiux_mobile_wireframe.description: Design and document a mobile app wireframe for a student productivity product.
requirements: Design at least five mobile screens
proj_uiux_mobile_wireframe.title: Mobile App Wireframe Case Study

q1.explanation: JOIN combines related rows from multiple tables.

q2.explanation: Input validation reduces invalid, unsafe, or unexpected data.

q3.explanation: CSV cleaning commonly outputs a cleaned data file.

q4.explanation: Invalid requests should receive clear error responses.

q1.explanation: CI runs checks automatically when code changes.

q2.explanation: Build verification is commonly required before deployment.

q3.explanation: Failed required stages should stop deployment.

q4.explanation: Clear commit messages help understand project history.

q1.explanation: A Dockerfile defines how a container image is built.

q2.explanation: IAM controls users, roles, and permissions in cloud environments.

q3.explanation: Monitoring helps detect problems and track system health.

q4.explanation: Cloud blueprints should describe architecture and operational concerns.

q1.explanation: Least privilege means granting only needed access.

q2.explanation: Frontend code can be inspected, so secrets do not belong there.

q4.explanation: Security checklists should cover core defensive controls.

q1.explanation: Pandas is widely used for data analysis in Python.

q2.explanation: Missing values can distort analysis and model results.

q3.explanation: Good charts need clear labels and useful insights.

q4.explanation: GROUP BY groups rows for aggregate calculations.

q1.explanation: Layers transform data through learned weights.

q3.explanation: Training too closely on training data can cause overfitting.

q4.explanation: Validation data helps monitor model performance during training.

q1.explanation: map transforms each item and returns a new array.

q2.explanation: await pauses execution inside an async function until a Promise settles.

q3.explanation: reduce is commonly used to accumulate one result such as a total.

q4.explanation: const prevents reassignment of the variable binding.

q1.explanation: Testing data helps evaluate performance on unseen examples.

q2.explanation: Overfitting happens when a model memorizes training data too closely.

q3.explanation: Accuracy is a common classification metric.

q4.explanation: Models should be evaluated and their limitations explained.

q1.explanation: Clear routing improves maintainability and navigation structure.

q2.explanation: Shared layouts commonly contain navigation and page structure.

q3.explanation: Loading and error states make data-fetching experiences clearer.

q4.explanation: Route names should clearly describe the page purpose.

q1.explanation: User stories describe user needs and outcomes.

q2.explanation: A PRD should include problem, users, requirements, metrics, and risks.

q3.explanation: Acceptance criteria define when a story is done.

q4.explanation: Prioritization focuses effort on the highest-value work.

q1.explanation: Good prompts include role, context, constraints, and expected output.

q2.explanation: Avoiding unnecessary private data protects user privacy.

q3.explanation: Specifying format helps produce structured output.

q4.explanation: Recommendations should be based on goals, gaps, and available resources.

q3.explanation: Keys help React identify which list items changed.

q4.explanation: Reusable components should avoid unnecessary hardcoded data.

q1.explanation: Meta descriptions summarize pages in search results.

q2.explanation: Content calendars organize topics, timing, audience, and publishing plans.

q3.explanation: Useful updates include completed work, blockers, next steps, and requests.

q4.explanation: Clear audience targeting makes content more relevant and useful.

q1.explanation: Interfaces define the expected shape of objects.

q2.explanation: The pipe symbol creates a union type.

q3.explanation: A question mark makes the property optional.

q4.explanation: Strict typing catches data-shape mistakes early.

q1.explanation: Wireframes plan layout and structure before visual polish.

q2.explanation: Open-ended questions reveal user needs and context.

q3.explanation: Usability focuses on clear and efficient task completion.

q4.explanation: Case studies should explain problem, process, decisions, and outcomes.
